decision.statement: Every both-diverged path was reviewed against the immutable implementation tree. Strict event-location reads remain deliberately deferred until the 9 production blockers are repaired; no production writes were authorized or performed.

evidence.result: 3791 changed paths; 1173 discarded paths; 1173 valid receipts; 0 unreceipted; 0 invalid.
861 passing test executions across recovery, regression, shell, event, profile, host, and design surfaces.
Generated schema synchronized; contract/rules checks and 163 Flutter tests passed.

evidence.command: React architecture checks plus website/admin tests, typechecks, production builds, Storybook builds, and bundle budgets
evidence.result: All selected web validation loops passed.

evidence.command: npm --prefix operations test && npm --prefix operations run check && npm --prefix operations run smoke
evidence.result: 75 tests plus check and smoke passed.
64 component contracts, 35 screens/239 sections, 880 components/929 builders/930 references, 27 top-bar self-tests, and selected scanners passed.
211 providers and 411 callsites regenerated/validated; no cycles.
2774 keys; 2774 used; 0 orphaned; 0 baselined; 0 missing generated getters. All 97 audited zero-reference keys were pruned.
272 scanned; 125 valid; 138 deterministic repairs; 9 blockers; 0 warnings; 0 writes. Strict reads remain deferred.
100/100; 3069/3069 readiness checks passed before the immutable implementation commit.

evidence.command: Deterministic ledger validation against the raw four-tree report
evidence.result: 248/248 both-diverged paths represented once with exact changed/entry snapshots and nonempty rationale/evidence.
